title: Megupack
description: This resource pack replaces creeper and pig with their "true" versions
body:
This resource pack replaces creeper and pig with their "true" versions (with sounds of course). Now you can feed Pigumin, breed Pigumins or even ride Pigumin. And beware of Creepergumin if she gets angry she will blow you with her "EXPLOSION!". To avoid this you can use another Megumin - Megumin of undying! She will save you from death (ohhhh yeahhhh).
Make your world full of beautiful Megumin sounds as "Maazic", "Chunchunmaru", "Waganawamegumin" and "Sasai Kudasai"
US English and Russian languages supported

There are three different types of Pigumin: Warm, Cold and Temperate.

Alternative download:
[Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/megupack-en/) (full vertion)
